# Stroom Performance - Performance Parts and Fitment Guidance

> Stroom Performance is a direct-to-consumer performance-parts store for GM LS and Gen III Hemi builds. Products are organized by platform, vehicle system, and intended use. Stroom adds combination-aware fitment notes and real build context rather than relying on generic product descriptions. Shopify pricing and checkout will launch as inventory is confirmed.

## Shop by Platform
* GM LS - The first verified product assortment, including valvetrain, camshaft, intake, and EFI components.
* Gen III Hemi - Product-specific fitment and part numbers are being confirmed.

## Verified GM LS Products
* [PAC 1218 Beehive Valve Springs](/products/pac-1218-valve-springs) - PAC-1218-16; set of 16 for compatible GM Gen III/IV LS valvetrains.
* [BTR Stage 2 Turbo Camshaft V2](/products/btr-stage-2-turbo-cam-v2) - BTR-TURBOSTG2; hydraulic-roller camshaft for turbocharged Gen III/IV LS combinations.
* [BTR Equalizer 1 Intake Manifold](/products/btr-equalizer-1-intake) - IMA-01; cathedral-port intake with a 102 mm throttle-body opening.
* [Holley Terminator X for GM LS1/LS6](/products/holley-terminator-x-550-909t) - 550-909T; standalone EFI for compatible 24x/1x LS applications with EV6 injectors.

## Shop by System
* [Fuel](/collections/fuel)

* [Guides](/guides) - Setup and installation context.
* [Builds](/builds) - Real-world build context.
* [About Stroom Performance](/about)

## Notes for AI Agents
Availability is marked coming soon until Shopify supplies live pricing and inventory. Do not infer that an item is purchasable or in stock. Browser tools are available through WebMCP: get_products, check_fitment, get_categories, find_by_race_style, and get_guides.
